name: 死写 -SHISYA-
short_description: Horror adventure game to appraise spirits photos
detailed_description:
A horror adventure game from TEAM SHINZA.
Players identify various ghost photos while commenting on live videos.
Uncover the facts hidden in the spirit photographs and get to the truth.

The operation is only a simple tap.
Equipped with automatic save function, already read skip function, and backlog function.

Please experience the fear that erodes from the spirit photograph.

2023/10/26 Update

1. Volume balance adjustment
2. Corrected variations in some spirit photography.

The content is enjoyable even for those who watched the play broadcast.
